title: Case Study: APT Lab
description: How the APT Lab used systems thinking and rapid prototyping to deliver a complex product in record time.
excerpt: Background  APT Lab was tasked with building a new product under tight deadlines and ambiguous requirements.   Approach   Used systems mapping to clarify goals

title: Case Study: Continuous Delivery
description: Implementing continuous delivery to accelerate product development.
excerpt: Background  The team wanted to release features faster without sacrificing quality.   Approach   Automated build and deployment

title: Case Study: Design System Rollout
description: Rolling out a design system to unify UI across multiple products.
excerpt: Background  Multiple products had diverging UI patterns, causing confusion and slowing development.   Approach   Created a shared design system

title: Case Study: Feedback Multiplier
description: How a feedback culture transformed a struggling team into a high-performing one.
excerpt: Background  The team was missing deadlines and morale was low.   Approach   Introduced regular feedback sessions

title: Case Study: Learning Loops
description: How a team used feedback loops to improve product quality and team performance.
excerpt: Background  The team struggled with slow feedback and unclear goals.   Approach   Introduced regular feedback sessions

title: Case Study: Portfolio Redesign
description: Redesigning a personal portfolio site to showcase work, learning, and systems thinking.
excerpt: Background  The original portfolio site was static and hard to update. The goal was to create a living portfolio that could grow with new work and ideas.   Approach   Modular content structure

title: Case Study: Adopting shadcn UI Builder
description: How a team integrated shadcn UI Builder into their design system workflow.
